sections.content:
# Appeals Architecture

This document describes the architecture of the Appeals software system including:

- Front-Office Appeals
- Back-Office Appeals
- Integration Layer

people.description: A local planning authority, issuing decisions on planning applications
people.name: LPA

people.description: A member of the public, or a representative, appealing against a planning decision
people.name: Appellant

people.description: Validates and manages case data, documents and general appeal processing
people.name: Case officer

people.description: Inspects the appeal site and issues appeal decisions
people.name: Inspector

containers.description: Stores all files uploaded in the Front-Office
containers.name: Blob storage for documents
containers.technology: Node.js, Azure Web App, Azure Function App

softwareSystems.description: Public dashboards for appellants and LPAs
softwareSystems.name: Appeals Front-Office
softwareSystems.tags: Element,Software System,Node.js,Azure Web App,Azure Function App,InternalCollaborationSystem

relationships.description: Reads and writes cache and session data
Reads and writes files to blob storage
Reads and writes data to database

containers.description: Consumes appellant and LPA submissions from Service Bus
containers.name: Casedata import

containers.description: Copies blobs from Front-Office, processes virus scanning
containers.name: Document processing

softwareSystems.description: Internal service to manage planning appeals in England
softwareSystems.name: Appeals Back-Office

relationships.description: Records changes to site visits and other events
Requests the addition of LPA responses to appeals
Requests the addition of LPA responses to appeals
Informs subscribers of changes to appeals
Informs subscribers of changes to appeals
Informs subscribers of changes to documents
Informs subscribers of changes to documents
Informs subscribers of changes to service users information
Informs subscribers of changes to service users information
Informs subscribers of changes to site visits and other events
Informs subscribers of changes to site visits and other events
Informs subscribers of changes to appeals
Informs subscribers of changes to appeals

containers.description: Holds all Planning Inspectorate data so that it can be used for internal purposes
containers.name: Operational Data Warehouse (ODW)
Azure Event Grid
containers.technology: Reports virus scan results for uploaded blobs

softwareSystems.description: Distributed messaging platform to exchange data between applications
softwareSystems.name: Integration Layer

relationships.description: Informs subscribers of changes to appeals

containers.description: UK government messaging platform for sending emails, text and letters to users
containers.name: GOV Notify

softwareSystems.description: UK government messaging platform for sending emails, text and letters to users
softwareSystems.name: GOV Notify
